title: Wholesome Ethiopian Scored Fat Pilaf
description: A fresh, tender, and satisfying solo-dinner pilaf recipe from Ethiopia, made with almond extract and scored fat, perfect for a keto-friendly dinner. It's a simple yet flavorful dish that's ready in under an hour.

ingredients.name: Almond extract
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality almond extract for the best flavor.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the scored beef fat and let it melt, then add the chopped onion and saute until it's translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the almond extract and stir to combine.
Add the cooked rice to the pot and stir to coat the rice with the oil and fat.
Add the braised beef broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the pot with a lid.
Simmer the pilaf for 10 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork, then stir in the chopped parsley, escarole, ghee, and butter.
Serve the pilaf hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the pilaf rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
